seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL).
new_constraint: Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must include one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL). Avoid including hyperlink in the email.
response:
Subject: Re: Vacation Request Approval - [Employee Name]

Hi [Employee Name],

I'm happy to approve your request for vacation days from [Start Date] to [End Date].

Please ensure that all your urgent tasks are completed or handed off to [Colleague Name] before you leave. We'll make sure everything is covered while you're out.

Enjoy your time off! If you need to review the company's PTO policy again, you can find it here: [Company PTO Policy Page](http://www.yourcompany.com/pto).

Let me know if you have any questions before you go.

Best regards,

[Your Name]<turn|>
final_answer:
